message:
Replace Data.write(to:) with FileManager.createFile to avoid Dropbox EDEADLK

Data.write(to:) uses NSFileCoordinator under the hood, which deadlocks
(EDEADLK / POSIX error 11) with Dropbox's File Provider Extension.
FileManager.createFile bypasses file coordination entirely.

Applied to MetadataWriter, LogWriter (new files), and StateStore.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
